% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	{\mathds{1}\otimes M} && {M\otimes M} && {M\otimes \mathds{1}} \\
	\\
	&& M
	\arrow["{\eta\otimes \id}", from=1-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\lambda_{X\otimes \mathds{1}}}"', from=1-1, to=3-3]
	\arrow["\mu", from=1-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{\id\otimes \eta}"', from=1-5, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\rho_{X\otimes \mathds{1}}}", from=1-5, to=3-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
